# BoldRemo - Houston Bathroom Remodeling

> BoldRemo is Houston's premier bathroom remodeling company serving Heights, Bellaire, River Oaks, and Kingwood.

## About
BoldRemo specializes in luxury bathroom renovations, custom tile installation, and flooring services in the Houston metropolitan area. We transform outdated bathrooms into stunning, functional spaces.

## Services
- Complete Bathroom Remodeling
- Custom Tile Installation
- Flooring Services
- Shower and Tub Conversions
- Vanity and Countertop Installation
- Plumbing Fixtures Upgrades

## Service Areas
- Houston, TX
- Houston Heights
- Bellaire, TX
- River Oaks
- Kingwood, TX
